title: tabernaemontana wullschlaegelii var. glaucescens
intro: Tabernaemontana wullschlaegelii var. glaucescens is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimalarial effects. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana wullschlaegelii var. glaucescens include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, decoctions, or infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine in certain regions of the world.
